query:
SELECT 
  w.id as worker_id,
  w.name,
  g.daily_rate,
  gs.start_time,
  gs.end_time,
  gs.required_hours,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_in' THEN 1 END) as check_ins,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_out' THEN 1 END) as check_outs,
  ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN ae.event_type = 'check_in' THEN 1 END) / 5) * g.daily_rate, 2) as estimated_pay
FROM workers w
JOIN groups g ON w.group_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN group_schedules gs ON g.id = gs.group_id AND gs.day_of_week = 0
LEFT JOIN attendance_events ae ON w.id = ae.worker_id AND DATE(ae.event_time) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)
WHERE w.group_id = 1
GROUP BY w.id, w.name, g.daily_rate, gs.start_time, gs.end_time, gs.required_hours
LIMIT 5;
